name: MeiraGTx Holdings plc
business: We are a vertically integrated, clinical-stage genetic medicines company with a broad pipeline of late-stage clinical programs, including radiation-induced xerostomia, Parkinson’s disease and AIPL1-associated retinal dystrophy. Our clinical programs use targeted local delivery of small doses of genetic medicines to treat both inherited and more common conditions with severe unmet need. In addition, we have developed a transformative gene regulation platform using bespoke synthetic riboswitch technology invented in-house that allows for the precise, dose-responsive control of any transgene under the control of oral small molecules.
sellsTo: pharmaceutical companies (through collaboration agreements and manufacturing services)

exposures.sentence: Our clinical programs use targeted local delivery of small doses of genetic medicines to treat both inherited and more common conditions with severe unmet need.

We have developed a transformative gene regulation platform using bespoke synthetic riboswitch technology invented in-house that allows for the precise, dose-responsive control of any transgene under the control of oral small molecules.

catalysts.sentence: with a potential BLA filing in the first half of 2027

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 3 study for AAV-GAD
catalysts.sentence: We are currently engaging with clinical trial sites globally and expect to initiate the Phase 3 study of AAV-GAD in the coming months.

catalysts.event: Closing of strategic collaboration with Hologen
catalysts.sentence: together with the $55.0 million received to date in the first quarter of 2026, which is non-refundable, $5.0 million in receivables from Hologen and the remaining $95.0 million from the anticipated closing of the strategic collaboration with Hologen
